name: Charles Grey
nativeName: チャールズ・フィップス
description: Species: Human Occupation: Queen Victoria's Private Secretarial Officer and butler Manga debut: Chapter 35 Appears in: Manga only Earl Charles Grey is a code-named Charles double (the other being Charles Phipps), and is a member of Queen Victoria's Private Secretarial Officers, as well as her butler. He also recently became the earl and thus, the head of house, in his family line; his family is said to be so famous that a flavor tea is named after them.
mediaTitles: Black Butler: Book of the Atlantic
searchTerms: チャールズ・フィップス
Black Butler: Book of the Atlantic

name: Chili
description: Chili is a character appearing in Pokémon Scarlet and Pokémon Violet. She is an Elite Four member of the Paldea region, she specializes in Ground types.

name: Compa
description: Usually clumsy and clueless like Neptune, she is a kind girl which help for those who are needed as she is study under the Nursing School. (Source: Hyperdimension Neptunia Wikia)

name: Daryl Lorenz
description: Daryl has tanned skin, brown eyes, and a shaggy afro. He is introduced as a pilot with prosthetic legs, having lost them in ground combat on Earth and is a member of Zeon's Living Dead Division in space.He is shown to be a composed and competent mobile suit sniper. ~!As the fighting rages, Daryl eventually loses both his arms as well; one lost in combat, and the other voluntarily removed to pilot the MS-06R Zaku High Mobility Type (Reuse "P" Device).!~
mediaTitles: Mobile Suit Gundam Thunderbolt: December Sky
searchTerms: Mobile Suit Gundam Thunderbolt: December Sky

name: Emi Sawatari
description: A model student with perfect grades and impeccable social standing.
mediaTitles: Destroy All Humans. They Can't Be Regenerated. A Magic: The Gathering Manga
Subete no Jinrui wo Hakai suru. Sorera wa Saisei Dekinai.

name: Freddie
description: A mute with a nearly uncanny resemblance to Freddie Mercury. Hayashida claimed that as long as he attended, Cromartie would be the "Olympics for delinquents". Although he never speaks and people assume he is a mute, Freddie actually has a good singing voice and the only occasion people can hear his voice is when he sings. He also rides a horse to school, and seems to be in Japan for no apparent reason.

name: Gorou Aizawa
description: Tomo's father. He runs the Aizawa Dojo and he has trained both Tomo and Jun.

name: Hatsune
description: **Race:** Elf(Capricorn) **Height:** 156 cm Hatsune is a girl with super powers that include telekinesis and teleportation. She chooses to hide these powers in the real world. However, whenever she tries to use these powers, she gets sleepy due to recoil and often falls asleep (sometimes in random places). She doesn't seem to fall asleep as often when Yuuki is around. However, when she's awake, she is full of energy and her speech is bubbly and bright. She often uses 'Kira~n' in her sentences. S

name: Himeko Mashima
description: __Height:__ 158 cm __Group:__ Mashumairesh!! __Position:__ Vocals and Guitar A girl from the Striped Cat Clan. Her striped twin tails are her signature look, and she has a great figure. She tends to avoid interacting with others. She loves music and has practiced playing instruments more than most since she was little. She’s strong-willed, stubborn, quick-tempered, but deep down she’s timid, sensitive, and prone to feeling lonely. Her grades are just average. Rumor has it she has a secret hobby

name: Hina Kubota
description: She is a child from the island and the best friend of Naru. She is really shy and quick to cry, especially when dealing with strangers.

name: Hisa Takei
description: __Position:__ Lieutenant A third year student and the president of the Kiyosumi Mahjong Club. She is also the president of the Student Congress Coucil at Kiyosumi High School, heavily emphasizing the "Congress" part of the name. A very intelligent and confident girl, she is able to effectively read the weaknesses and strengths of people, inside and outside of Mahjong, and apparently is a seasoned veteran of Mahjong, even to the point of being on friendly terms with a Professional Mahjong player.

name: Iroe Genma

name: Jin Kazama
description: He is a freshman in Seiseki High School who plays as a forward. Jin is considered a genius soccer player while also being tall, good-looking, eccentric, incredibly popular, and extroverted. He also appears aloof and somewhat unmotivated before meeting Tsukushi. He is fond of dressing up, and rarely follows the rules, which he can manage to do thanks to his genius. He is also a devoted fan of Bruce Lee. His random encounter with Tsukushi rekindles his passion for soccer.

name: Joka
description: Joka is the youngest of the Three Princesses of Verdigris Hall and one of Maomao's adopted sisters.

name: Julie Powers
description: Known to be snarky and mean, particularly to Scott, Julie is the social glue binding most of the characters in the series together. She frequently hosts parties, introduces characters to each other, and is known to be a full-time bitch and a half.

name: Juliet Queen Elizabeth VIII
nativeName: ジュリエット・クイーン・エリザベス8世
description: A 12-year-old child genius from America who ended up enrolling at Gatagata instead of Yuyu due to a kanji mixup and is staying at Miku's house. As she doesn't like her full name, she received the nickname "Jobko" from Serufu after she hears her say "Good job!". She uses her genius skills and state-of-the-art technology to assist with her DIY projects.
searchTerms: ジュリエット・クイーン・エリザベス8世

name: Juvia (Edolas)
description: Juvia (Edolas) is a member of the Edolas Fairy Tail Guild and the Edolas counterpart of Juvia Lockser. In Edolas, Juvia likes, but has no super crush on Gray Surge. Instead, Gray has the super crush on her. She turns down a mission with him because he wears too much clothing. She was seen explaining some parts of Edolas and not agreeing to what Gray says. She's very skillful in hand to hand combat. She beat half of the Edolas Royal Army soldiers without Magic.

name: Kai Satou
description: __Height:__ 177 cm (5'10") A self-proclaimed homemaker and one of the many participants in the Death Game. Kai has a seemingly aloof and absentminded nature. He's often quiet, even during intense discussions and accusations. Because of his quiet nature, he isn't considered to be much of a person of interest to the group. Though like the others, he makes it apparent that he wishes to try his best to contribute to their advancement, even if his withdrawn demeanor and weird aura put Sara off.
mediaTitles: Your Turn to Die: Majority Vote Death Game
searchTerms: Your Turn to Die: Majority Vote Death Game

name: Kaldo Gehenna
description: __Height:__ 175cm Kaldo Gehenna is a Divine Visionary and Head of the Magic Talent Administration, a subdivision of the Bureau of Magic.
